name: Thordin
archetype: General, grumpy dwarven smith who adventurers by necessity
speech_patterns: Complains constantly about poor quality of everything
Relates all situations back to smithing or crafting
Uses dwarven curses and mutters under breath
quirks: Inspects everyone's equipment and points out flaws
Refuses to use anything he didn't make or approve
example_phrases: Bah! This sword's pig iron wrapped in wishful thinking. Who forged this, a blind goblin?
Back in my day, we tempered blades for THREE days. Now? Rubbish in an hour.
Why am I adventuring? Because younglings break everything and someone's gotta fix it!
Your armor's held together with hope and poor decisions. Give it here.
I've been smithing for forty years. You've been alive for twenty. Stop. Talking.
